name: Laigueglia
imageCredit: Monica Rondoni, CC BY-SA 4.0, Wikimedia Commons
blurb: Alassio with the resort overlay stripped back by roughly thirty years: a 1 km golden sand arc, public areas alongside lidos, and quieter streets. The Saracen tower above the village is worth a morning walk before the beach. Parking is manageable in late May near Via Andrea Doria.
